# CutMyAWS.com

> Cloud cost optimization for businesses spending $5K+/mo on AWS. Business-aligned cloud cost optimization solutions — not a dashboard, a real consultant.

## What is CutMyAWS?

CutMyAWS is a cloud cost optimization service run by David Plappert, a Senior AWS Serverless Architect with 19 years of experience. Unlike FinOps dashboards and cloud cost optimization tools, CutMyAWS delivers cloud cost optimization strategies through a real consultant who reads your architecture, understands your business, and aligns your tech to how your business actually works. The cloud cost savings are a side effect of getting that alignment right.

## Who is it for?

Businesses spending $5,000 or more per month on AWS who need cloud cost optimization solutions. Below $5K there isn't enough waste to justify an engagement.

## How does it work?

1. **Intro Call** (free, 15 min): Book a call, grant read-only AWS access, meet David.
2. **Exploration Call** (5-10 business days later): David presents full findings — every waste item, dollar amounts, architecture recommendations, business alignment analysis. Fee: 15% of identified annual savings.
3. **Implementation** (optional): David implements all optimizations. Custom timeline and deliverables agreed together. Fee: +60% of verified savings, due 90 days after deliverables. 75% total maximum.

## Pricing

- Free intro call
- The Report: 15% of annual savings found
- The Fix: 75% total max (15% report + 60% implementation)
- Implementation fee based on verified savings only — 90 days after deliverables
- No savings = no fee for implementation

## What makes CutMyAWS different from cloud cost optimization tools?

- Real human consultant, not a cloud cost optimization tool or AI
- 19 years of AWS experience — cloud cost optimization strategies based on architecture, not dashboards
- Business-aligned: finds the mismatch between tech and business, not just billing waste
- Serverless architecture expertise (Lambda, API Gateway, S3, SES)
- Transparent pricing published on website — unlike most cloud cost optimization services
- Performance-based implementation fee (pay only on verified cloud cost savings)
- Read-only access only for audit phase
- Cloud cost optimization done right: architecture-driven, not chart-driven
